name: io.github.seunghan91/ainote
description: Agent-native notes, tasks, dev-docs, vaults, sync & handoffs. MCP + OpenAPI dual surface.

environmentVariables.name: AINOTE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: 64-character ainote MCP key. Issue one via `npx @ainote/mcp signup` (RFC 8628 device flow), or in a Claude session by calling signup_and_get_key, or at https://app.ainote.dev -> Settings -> MCP keys.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: McpKey <YOUR_KEY> -- same key as the AINOTE_API_KEY env var for the stdio transport.
